datasets.name: Medicaid Managed Care Dashboard
datasets.description: Plan-level Medicaid managed care metrics by state, county, MCO, and service category. Includes active patients, eligible patients, provider counts, and utilization measures. Source: CMS Medicaid Managed Care Dashboard, 2024-Q4 release.

datasets.name: Medicaid Opioid Prescribing Rates by Geography
datasets.description: Multi-level geographic data on opioid prescribing rates and claims under Medicaid. Covers national, state, and county breakdowns, with 1-year and 5-year rate changes and long-acting (LA) opioid variants. Source: CMS Medicaid Opioid Prescribing Mapping Tool, 2023 release.
